title: Create sources + chunks schema and indexes (migration)
userStory: As a developer, I want the sources and chunks tables with the right indexes so that the substrate can store source docs and their embedded chunks.
acceptanceCriteria: A migration creates sources(id, kind, title, raw_text, parent_id FK, path, version, created_at, updated_at)
A migration creates chunks(id, source_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, heading, text, position, embedding vector(N), created_at, fts tsvector GENERATED from heading+text)
Indexes: HNSW on chunks.embedding (vector_cosine_ops), GIN on chunks.fts, btree text_pattern_ops on sources.path, btree on chunks(source_id, position)
vector(N) dimension matches the configured Voyage model
Migration runs clean on the local Postgres and is re-runnable / reversible
Verify: psql \d sources and \d chunks show the columns and indexes
